name: pyre-code
description: LeetCode-style ML coding problems — implement PyTorch modules from scratch
author: kiren

scripts.predev: PYTHON=$(test -x .venv/bin/python && echo .venv/bin/python || echo python) && $PYTHON -c 'import torch_judge' || (echo '\nERROR: Python environment not found. Run ./setup.sh or activate your conda env.\n' && exit 1)
scripts.dev:backend: PYTHON=$(test -x .venv/bin/python && echo .venv/bin/python || echo python) && $PYTHON -m uvicorn grading_service.main:app --reload --reload-exclude '.git' --reload-exclude '.venv' --port 8000 --log-level info
